title: polypodium latealatum
intro: Polypodium leutaleum, also known as Autumn Polypody, is a species of fern native to North America, characterized by its delicate fronds and adaptations for shade and moisture retention. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been found to be effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Polypodium leutaleum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce pain and inflammation, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or capsules, and are often used in combination with other herbal remedies to enhance their efficacy.
